'''âr-y-z''' ('''rayaza''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:angelise|angelise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-y-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:angelise|angelise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-y-z
|-
! Lemma
| rayaza
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rayazithi|rayazithi]] || [[word:rayaziji|rayaziji]] || [[word:rayazishi|rayazishi]] || [[word:rayazi|rayazi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rayazuthuth|rayazuthuth]] || [[word:rayazujuj|rayazujuj]] || [[word:rayazushush|rayazushush]] || [[word:rayaz|rayaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rayazuthu|rayazuthu]] || [[word:rayazuju|rayazuju]] || [[word:rayazushu|rayazushu]] || [[word:rayazu|rayazu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rayazufuth|rayazufuth]] || [[word:rayazufuj|rayazufuj]] || [[word:rayazufush|rayazufush]] || [[word:rayazuf|rayazuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rayazethe|rayazethe]] || [[word:rayazeje|rayazeje]] || [[word:rayazeshe|rayazeshe]] || [[word:rayaze|rayaze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rayazothoth|rayazothoth]] || [[word:rayazojoj|rayazojoj]] || [[word:rayazoshosh|rayazoshosh]] || [[word:rayaz|rayaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rayazotho|rayazotho]] || [[word:rayazojo|rayazojo]] || [[word:rayazosho|rayazosho]] || [[word:rayazo|rayazo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rayazofoth|rayazofoth]] || [[word:rayazofoj|rayazofoj]] || [[word:rayazofosh|rayazofosh]] || [[word:rayazof|rayazof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rayazĂŠthĂŠ|rayazĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:rayazĂŠjĂŠ|rayazĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:rayazĂŠshĂŠ|rayazĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:rayazĂŠ|rayazĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rayazathath|rayazathath]] || [[word:rayazajaj|rayazajaj]] || [[word:rayazashash|rayazashash]] || [[word:rayaz|rayaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rayazatha|rayazatha]] || [[word:rayazaja|rayazaja]] || [[word:rayazasha|rayazasha]] || [[word:rayaza|rayaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rayazafath|rayazafath]] || [[word:rayazafaj|rayazafaj]] || [[word:rayazafash|rayazafash]] || [[word:rayazaf|rayazaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:rayazasha|rayazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gorayazasha|gorayazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokirayazasha|gokirayazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:rayaznĂŒsha|rayaznĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gorayaznknĂŒsha|gorayaznknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokirayaznĂŒsha|gokirayaznĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rayazshĂ«sha|rayazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorayaznkshĂ«sha|gorayaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirayazshĂ«sha|gokirayazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rayazrosha|rayazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorayaznkrosha|gorayaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirayazrosha|gokirayazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rayazmusha|rayazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gorayaznkmusha|gorayaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirayazmusha|gokirayazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:rayazsherasha|rayazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gorayaznksherasha|gorayaznksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokirayazsherasha|gokirayazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:rayazngasha|rayazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gorayaznkngasha|gorayaznkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokirayazngasha|gokirayazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rayazyasha|rayazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gorayaznkyasha|gorayaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokirayazyasha|gokirayazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:rayazyamasha|rayazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gorayaznkyamasha|gorayaznkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokirayazyamasha|gokirayazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:rayaznĂŒshĂ«sha|rayaznĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorayaznknĂŒshĂ«sha|gorayaznknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirayaznĂŒshĂ«sha|gokirayaznĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rayaznĂŒrosha|rayaznĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorayaznknĂŒrosha|gorayaznknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirayaznĂŒrosha|gokirayaznĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rayaznĂŒmusha|rayaznĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorayaznknĂŒmusha|gorayaznknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirayaznĂŒmusha|gokirayaznĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:rayazshĂ«nĂŒsha|rayazshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorayaznkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gorayaznkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirayazshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokirayazshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rayazshĂ«rosha|rayazshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorayaznkshĂ«rosha|gorayaznkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirayazshĂ«rosha|gokirayazshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rayazshĂ«musha|rayazshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorayaznkshĂ«musha|gorayaznkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirayazshĂ«musha|gokirayazshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:rayazronĂŒsha|rayazronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorayaznkronĂŒsha|gorayaznkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirayazronĂŒsha|gokirayazronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:rayazroshĂ«sha|rayazroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorayaznkroshĂ«sha|gorayaznkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirayazroshĂ«sha|gokirayazroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rayazromusha|rayazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorayaznkromusha|gorayaznkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirayazromusha|gokirayazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:rayazmunĂŒsha|rayazmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorayaznkmunĂŒsha|gorayaznkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirayazmunĂŒsha|gokirayazmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:rayazmushĂ«sha|rayazmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorayaznkmushĂ«sha|gorayaznkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirayazmushĂ«sha|gokirayazmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rayazmurosha|rayazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorayaznkmurosha|gorayaznkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirayazmurosha|gokirayazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:rayaz|rayaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:rĂŠyĂŠz|rĂŠyĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horayaz|horayaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:horĂŠyĂŠz|horĂŠyĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorayaz|hohorayaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorĂŠyĂŠz|hohorĂŠyĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒrayaz|nĂŒrayaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒrĂŠyĂŠz|nĂŒrĂŠyĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒrayaz|nĂŒnĂŒrayaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠyĂŠz|nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠyĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻrayaz|nĂŻrayaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻrĂŠyĂŠz|nĂŻrĂŠyĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻrayaz|nĂŻnĂŻrayaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠyĂŠz|nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠyĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lurayaz|lurayaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lurĂŠyĂŠz|lurĂŠyĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurayaz|lulurayaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurĂŠyĂŠz|lulurĂŠyĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lirayaz|lirayaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lirĂŠyĂŠz|lirĂŠyĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirayaz|lilirayaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirĂŠyĂŠz|lilirĂŠyĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:korayaz|korayaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:korĂŠyĂŠz|korĂŠyĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorayaz|kokorayaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorĂŠyĂŠz|kokorĂŠyĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kerayaz|kerayaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kerĂŠyĂŠz|kerĂŠyĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerayaz|kekerayaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerĂŠyĂŠz|kekerĂŠyĂŠz]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
